message:
fix(io): reject invalid Unicode code points in string payload decoding instead of silently dropping them

- Change decode_unicode_element() to return Result and fail closed on
  invalid Unicode code points (cp > 0x10FFFF or surrogate halves) via
  char::from_u32() validation, rather than silently skipping invalid
  characters which could mask data corruption
- Propagate the error through fromfile_strings() callers
- Add fromfile_strings_rejects_invalid_unicode_code_point test verifying
  that code point 0x110000 (just above the valid Unicode range) is rejected

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
